mbrick_motor_init.tooltip: Initialize one DC motor with fixed pin mapping.

mbrick_motor_forward.tooltip: Run the motor forward with PWM 0-255.

mbrick_motor_backward.tooltip: Run the motor backward with PWM 0-255.

mbrick_motor_stop.tooltip: Stop the motor in coast or brake mode.

mbrick_motor_set_speed.tooltip: Update motor PWM while it is already running.

mbrick_motor_is_running.tooltip: Check whether the motor is currently running.

mbrick_car_init.message0: Initialize 2WD car %1 left motor %2 right motor %3
mbrick_car_init.tooltip: Create a 2WD differential car from two initialized motors.

mbrick_car_forward.tooltip: Drive the 2WD car forward at 0-100% speed.

mbrick_car_backward.tooltip: Drive the 2WD car backward at 0-100% speed.

mbrick_car_turn_left.tooltip: Turn the 2WD car left at 0-100% speed.

mbrick_car_turn_right.tooltip: Turn the 2WD car right at 0-100% speed.

mbrick_car_stop.tooltip: Stop the 2WD car in coast or brake mode.

mbrick_car_set_speed.tooltip: Update 2WD car speed while it is already moving.

mbrick_car_set_min_pwm.tooltip: Set the minimum PWM used to overcome motor dead zone.

mbrick_car4wd_init.message0: Initialize 4WD car %1 left front %2 left rear %3 right front %4 right rear %5
mbrick_car4wd_init.tooltip: Create a 4WD car from four initialized motors.

mbrick_car4wd_forward.tooltip: Drive the 4WD car forward at 0-100% speed.

mbrick_car4wd_backward.tooltip: Drive the 4WD car backward at 0-100% speed.

mbrick_car4wd_turn_left.tooltip: Turn the 4WD car left at 0-100% speed.

mbrick_car4wd_turn_right.tooltip: Turn the 4WD car right at 0-100% speed.

mbrick_car4wd_stop.tooltip: Stop the 4WD car in coast or brake mode.

mbrick_car4wd_set_speed.tooltip: Update 4WD car speed while it is already moving.

mbrick_car4wd_set_min_pwm.tooltip: Set the minimum PWM for 4WD startup compensation.
